It is a genus of plants that are native to Europe and Asia. The classification of Adonanthe apennina also includes it being part of the order Santalales and the clade Angiosperms. This plant's classification is further supported by its membership in the clade Streptophyta and the kingdom Plantae. Additionally, it is often grouped together with other flowering plants in the subkingdom Viridiplantae.
